violations.text: The presence of pest is not controlled as evidenced by droppings on chip shelf. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Droppings on chip shelf were cleaned during the time of inspection. No product was observed adulterated. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2024
The ceiling tiles in the storefront area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2024
Water was observed pooled in the corner of the basement by the stairs. Establishments must be kept free of pooling water. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The ceiling tiles above the coolers were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor by the coolers were observed with holes in them. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
